# Tire Plus

> Independent tire and auto service centre in Orleans, Ontario. Serving east Ottawa drivers since 2004. 27+ tire brands stocked, full auto repair, licensed DriveON safety inspection centre. Bilingual (English + Français). Family-run, 4.4-star Google rating from 185+ reviews.

## Location and hours
- Address: 2006 St. Joseph Blvd, Orleans, ON, Canada (at the corner of Jeanne D'Arc and St. Joseph)
- Phone: 613-834-7325
- Email: info@tireplus.ca
- Monday to Friday: 8:00 AM – 5:30 PM
- Saturday: 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM
- Sunday: closed
- Service area: Orleans, Ottawa, Cumberland, Rockland, Blackburn Hamlet, east Ottawa

## Services and starting prices
- [Tires and wheels search](https://tireplus.ca/search/): 27+ brands, instant pricing by vehicle or size. Tire prices include installation, balancing, and nitrogen.
- [Brake service](https://tireplus.ca/services/brakes/): Free brake inspections, pad and rotor replacement, brake fluid flush
- [Oil change](https://tireplus.ca/services/oil-change/): From $59 (oil filter and environmental fees extra). Regular, synthetic blend, and full synthetic available.
- [Wheel alignment](https://tireplus.ca/services/wheel-alignment/): From $159, Hunter precision equipment
- [DriveON safety inspection](https://tireplus.ca/services/driveon-inspection/): From $199, licensed Ontario inspection centre
- [Road Force balancing](https://tireplus.ca/services/road-force-balancing/): From $39, Hunter Road Force Elite
- Full service list: [English](https://tireplus.ca/#services) · [Français](https://tireplus.ca/fr/#services)
- Other services include exhaust repair, A/C service and recharge, suspension and shocks, battery/starter/alternator, radiator and coolant, fluid flushes, general repairs and diagnostics, TPMS service.

## Tire brands carried (27+)
Atturo, BFGoodrich, Bridgestone, Continental, Cooper, Dunlop, Falken, Firestone, General Tire, Gislaved, Goodyear, GT Radial, Hankook, Hifly, Kelly, Kumho, Laufenn, Michelin, Nexen, Nitto, Nokian, Pirelli, Sailun, Toyo, Triangle, Uniroyal, Yokohama.

## About
- [About Tire Plus](https://tireplus.ca/about/): Established 2004, 20+ years in Orleans, 10,000+ vehicles serviced
- [FAQ](https://tireplus.ca/faq/): Hours, services, prices, policies, winter tire timing, used tire availability
- Brand voice: honest assessments, transparent pricing, free walk-in brake and tire inspections, open Saturdays

- [Contact page](https://tireplus.ca/contact-us/) — send a message
- [Book an appointment](https://tireplus.ca/appointments/)
- [Français](https://tireplus.ca/fr/)
- Phone: 613-834-7325

## Trust signals
- 4.4-star Google rating, 185+ reviews
- Licensed DriveON Vehicle Inspection Centre (Ontario)
- Hunter precision alignment and Road Force balancing equipment
- 27+ tire brands stocked or available next-day
- Operating at 2006 St. Joseph Blvd since 2004
- Walk-in brake and tire inspections are always free
